items.title_en: Trump threatens 100% tariff on countries putting 'Digital Services Tax on American Companies'
items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁对“对美国公司征收数字服务税”的国家征收 100% 关税
items.desc_en: "This TARIFF will supersede Trade Deals made with the Country, whether implemented, signed, or not," Trump wrote in a Truth Social post.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普在《真相社会》帖子中写道：“这项关税将取代与该国达成的贸易协议，无论是否实施、签署。”

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Moderna, ON Semiconductor, Rocket Lab, Eli Lilly, Sandisk & more
items.title_zh: 中午涨幅最大的股票：Moderna、ON Semiconductor、Rocket Lab、Eli Lilly、Sandisk 等
items.desc_en: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.
items.desc_zh: 以下是午盘交易中成为头条新闻的公司。

items.title_en: OpenAI limits new AI models to 'trusted partners' at request of U.S. government
items.title_zh: 应美国政府要求，OpenAI 将新的人工智能模型限制为“值得信赖的合作伙伴”
items.desc_en: OpenAI said it previewed the new models' capabilities with the government ahead of the launch.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 表示，它在发布前与政府预览了新模型的功能。

items.title_en: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震中母亲救女儿身亡
items.desc_en: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 589 people.
items.desc_zh: 埃克托·贝洛在社交媒体上写道，在这场造成至少 589 人死亡的地震中，“你们为我们的女儿献出了自己的生命”。

items.title_en: Ex-Trump adviser John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling classified documents
items.title_zh: 前特朗普顾问约翰·博尔顿承认不当处理机密文件
items.desc_en: Bolton faces a prison sentence of up to five years and has agreed to pay $2.25m in fine, prosecutors say.
items.desc_zh: 检察官称，博尔顿面临最高五年的监禁，并同意支付 225 万美元的罚款。

items.title_en: Trump says Iran violated ceasefire with drone attacks on Strait of Hormuz ships
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗无人机袭击霍尔木兹海峡船只违反停火协议
items.desc_en: The International Maritime Organization earlier paused efforts to evacuate ships and seafarers stranded in the Strait of Hormuz after a cargo vessel was struck.
items.desc_zh: 一艘货船被击中后，国际海事组织早些时候暂停了撤离滞留在霍尔木兹海峡的船只和海员的努力。

items.title_en: Citi cuts tech stock weighting: 'Difficult to see how everyone in AI/Tech path wins'
items.title_zh: 花旗削减科技股权重：“很难看到人工智能/科技道路上的每个人如何获胜”
items.desc_en: The tech trade is becoming rocky, and Citi thinks it's time for investors to trim positions in the sector.
items.desc_zh: 科技行业正变得不稳定，花旗认为投资者是时候削减该行业的头寸了。

items.title_en: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari says he expects a rate hike this year
items.title_zh: 明尼阿波利斯联储主席尼尔·卡什卡利表示，他预计今年将加息
items.desc_en: Kashkari said he sees a hike likely this year as the economy continues to feel the hit from spiking inflation.
items.desc_zh: 卡什卡利表示，由于经济继续受到通胀飙升的打击，他预计今年可能会加息。

items.title_en: ON Semi tanks 20% following Synaptics deal as CEO defends core business
items.title_zh: Synaptics 交易后安森美半导体股价下跌 20%，首席执行官捍卫核心业务
items.desc_en: The pivot into physical AI grows On Semi's addressable market by an additional $30 billion, the company said.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，转向物理人工智能将使 On Semi 的潜在市场额外增长 300 亿美元。

items.title_en: OpenAI hasn't held pre-IPO investor meetings or set timeline yet, sources say
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，OpenAI 尚未召开 IPO 前投资者会议或设定时间表
items.desc_en: OpenAI said it confidentially filed its prospectus with the SEC earlier this month, but noted it "may be a while" before it goes public.
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 表示，该公司本月早些时候向 SEC 秘密提交了招股说明书，但指出“可能需要一段时间”才能公开。

items.title_en: Four men held over child marriage in Sierra Leone appear in landmark court case
items.title_zh: 塞拉利昂四名因童婚而被拘留的男子出现在具有里程碑意义的法庭案件中
items.desc_en: It relates to a 17-year-old girl - four men including her father and husband face years in jail if convicted.
items.desc_zh: 这起案件涉及一名 17 岁女孩，如果罪名成立，包括她父亲和丈夫在内的四名男子将面临数年监禁。

items.title_en: Ex-Apollo CEO Leon Black says Jeffrey Epstein duped him out of more than $60 million
items.title_zh: 阿波罗前首席执行官莱昂·布莱克 (Leon Black) 表示，杰弗里·爱泼斯坦 (Jeffrey Epstein) 骗走了他超过 6000 万美元
items.desc_en: "I knew Jekyll. I didn't know Hyde," Leon Black says about Jeffrey Epstein in his prepared statement to the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee.
items.desc_zh: “我认识杰基尔。我不认识海德，”莱昂·布莱克在向众议院监督和政府改革委员会准备的声明中谈到杰弗里·爱泼斯坦时说道。

items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_zh: 法国指控强奸和性侵犯的妇女呼吁废除诉讼时效
items.desc_en: More than 50 women are calling for the abolition of the statute of limitations which they say has prevented them seeking justice.
items.desc_zh: 超过 50 名妇女呼吁废除诉讼时效，她们说诉讼时效阻碍了她们寻求正义。

items.title_en: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants
items.title_zh: 最高法院允许特朗普终止对海地和叙利亚移民的保护地位
items.desc_en: The ruling opens the path for the Trump administration to deport hundreds of thousands of immigrants who have been living in the US for years.
items.desc_zh: 这项裁决为特朗普政府驱逐数十万在美国生活多年的移民开辟了道路。

items.title_zh: 苹果提高MacBook和iPad价格，归咎于芯片成本上涨
items.desc_en: Apple said it had "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly".
items.desc_zh: 苹果表示，“从未见过零部件价格上涨如此之快”。

items.desc_en: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.
items.desc_zh: 德国部分地区气温可能达到 40 摄氏度，而法国官员表示，年轻人中出现了因高温而死亡的情况。
